zh.Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾

zh.Croesallgwn, Llangyndeyrn, Carmarthenshi: 英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry ap Griffith Dwnn於1330年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾時，他的父親Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan21歲，母親Annes ferch Cadwgon20歲。他於1350年與Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1383年住在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾。他去世於1411年在威爾士卡馬特史爾享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry ap Griffith Dwnn于1330年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾时，他的父亲Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan21岁，母亲Annes ferch Cadwgon20岁。他于1350年与Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1383年住在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利朗史代爾。他去世于1411年在威尔士卡馬特史爾享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Abt  .

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griffieth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .
German: variant of   Greif   1.

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire):
habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).
possibly a variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffes
meanings: Welsh: altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffeth
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

variants.name: Griffth
meanings: Variant of   Griffith  .

variants.name: Griffitt
meanings: Altered form of   Griffith  .

nameMeanings.name: Dwnn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Dinh, Hoa, Trang.
Irish (Tipperary): probably a variant of Scottish Din 6, from a short form of the personal name Dinis, a variant of Dennis .
Vietnamese: unexplained.

variants.name: Din
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Munir, Riaz, Akbar, Anwar, Ashraf, Ghulam, Mohammad, Salah, Shahid, Tariq, Zahir, Abdul.  Indian Amrit, Gulab, Hemant, Jitendra, Mohi, Neena, Shingara.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from the Arabic personal name Dīn, from dīn ‘religion’, or a shortened form of any of the many Arabic names formed with the same word, for example Saifuddin ‘sword of religion’ or Salahuddin ‘righteousness of religion’.
Indian (northern states): nickname from Sanskrit dina ‘humble’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry ap Griffith Dwnn was born in 1330, in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan, was 21 and his mother, Annes ferch Cadwgon, was 20. He married Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd in 1350, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He lived in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom in 1383. He died in 1411, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry ap Griffith Dwnn est né en 1330, à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Annes ferch Cadwgon, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd en 1350, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni en 1383. Il est décédé en 1411, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry ap Griffith Dwnn 1330 in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan 21 und seine Mutter Annes ferch Cadwgon 20. Er hat 1350 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1383 hat er in Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1411 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry ap Griffith Dwnn è nato il nel 1330 nel Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Annes ferch Cadwgon, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd nel 1350, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito nel 1383. Morì nel 1411, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry ap Griffith Dwnnが1330年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwganは21歳，母Annes ferch Cadwgonは20歳であった。1350年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでAnnes ferch Ieuan Lloydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年にはイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランジェンデイルンに住んでいた。彼は1411年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry ap Griffith Dwnn(이)가 1330년 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Annes ferch Cadwgon(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1350년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1383년도에 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랭데언에서 살았다. 그는 1411년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry ap Griffith Dwnn nasceu em 1330, em Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Annes ferch Cadwgon, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd em 1350, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom em 1383. Ele faleceu em 1411, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry ap Griffith Dwnn родился в 1330 г. в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Annes ferch Cadwgon, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd в 1350 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности ллангендирн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в 1383 году. Он умер в 1411 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 81 год.

sm.BET 1383 AND 1413: mai le 1383 e o'o I le 1413

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry ap Griffith Dwnn nació en 1330, en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd Dwnn ap Cadwgan, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Annes ferch Cadwgon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Annes ferch Ieuan Lloyd en 1350, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Vivió en Llangendeirne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido en 1383. Murió en 1411, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 81 años.
